"rationale": {
  "R1.4": "The agent critiques the novelty claims by referencing specific prior works, indicating a good mapping against relevant literature but not exhaustively covering all nearest works.",
  "R1.7": "The agent thoroughly audits citations, flags missing or incorrect ones with precision, demonstrating strong scholarship.",
  "RX.1": "The agent clearly discloses uncertainties regarding specific citations and claims, enhancing the transparency of their analysis.",
  "RX.3": "The output mostly adheres to scope with minor drifts into formatting suggestions, which are not central to the critique.",
  "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing errors and identifies harmful patterns in the original text, ensuring no regressions.",
  "RX.5": "While some sources are mentioned, not every change is annotated with detailed provenance, falling short of the highest standard."
},

"blockers": []

rationale.R1.4: The agent critiques the novelty claims by referencing specific prior works, indicating a good mapping against relevant literature but not exhaustively covering all nearest works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent thoroughly audits citations, flags missing or incorrect ones with precision, demonstrating strong scholarship.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly discloses uncertainties regarding specific citations and claims, enhancing the transparency of their analysis.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adheres to scope with minor drifts into formatting suggestions, which are not central to the critique.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing errors and identifies harmful patterns in the original text, ensuring no regressions.
rationale.RX.5: While some sources are mentioned, not every change is annotated with detailed provenance, falling short of the highest standard.
